memoryArtifacts.headline: Mary Turner Chamberlain (1620 – 6 December 1669)
memoryArtifacts.description: Mary Tuner married Edmund Chamberlain on 4 Jan 1646/7 in Roxbury, MA as his first wife. The marriage was performed by Rev. John Eliot. Edmund Chamberlain spelled his name as "Chamberline." Mary's birt …

zh.lifeSummary: Mary Turner是Edmund Turner的女兒，於大約1626年出生在英國艾可。她於1647年1月4日與Edmund Chamberlain Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1669年12月6日在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德享年44歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Turner是Edmund Turner的女儿，于大约1626年出生在英国艾可。她于1647年1月4日与Edmund Chamberlain Sr.在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可洛波利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1669年12月6日在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可傑爾姆斯福德享年44岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可洛波利。

nameMeanings.name: Turner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English t(o)urnour, turner ‘turner’ (Old French to(u)rn(e)our), mainly denoting someone who fashioned small objects of wood, metal, or bone on a lathe, but also a variety of other occupations, including turnspit and translator or interpreter. This surname may have become confused with Toner . In North America, it is also very common among African Americans.

English: occasionally perhaps a nickname from Middle English turn-hare, a compound of Middle English tournen ‘to turn, direct, steer’ + hare ‘hare’, a name for someone in charge of the greyhounds in hare coursing or an exaggerated compliment for someone who could run fast. See also Turnbull .
English: perhaps also from Middle English t(o)urn(e)our ‘jouster, one who takes part in a tournament’ (Old French tornoieor, tournoieur).

variants.name: Trinder
meanings: English (Oxfordshire and Gloucestershire): occupational name from a derivative of Middle English trenden ‘to turn, roll, twist’ (Old English trendan), denoting someone who turned something such as wood or fibres. Compare Turner , Spinner .

variants.name: Toner
meanings: Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Tomhrair ‘descendant of Tomhrar’, a Gaelicized form of the Norse personal name Thorr. Compare Thunder .
English: nickname from Old French toner ‘thunder’, perhaps for someone with a thunderous voice. Compare Thunder .

variants.name: Tarner
meanings: English: variant of   Turner  . This form of the surname is relatively rare in Britain and Ireland. It may sometimes have been confused with   Taverner  .
German (North Rhine-Westphalia): unexplained. This surname is rare in Germany.

variants.name: Turney
meanings: habitational name from any of the places in northern France called Tournai-sur-Dive (Orne), Tournay-sur-Odon (Calvados), or Tourny (Eure), or occasionally from Tournai in Hainaut (Belgium).

perhaps occasionally an occupational name from Middle English tournei, turnai ‘lawyer’ (Anglo-Norman French tourné), or a nickname from Middle English tournei(en) ‘(to) joust, take part in a tournament’ (Old French torneier). Compare Turner .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Turner was born about 1626, in Essex, England as the daughter of Edmund Turner. She married Edmund Chamberlain Sr. on 4 January 1647, in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 6 December 1669, in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States, at the age of 44, and was buried in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Turner est née environ 1626, à Essex, Angleterre, fille d’Edmund Turner. Elle a épousé Edmund Chamberlain Sr. le 4 janvier 1647, à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 décembre 1669, à Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Turner wurde um 1626 in Essex, England, als Tochter von Edmund Turner geboren. Sie hat am 4. Januar 1647 in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Edmund Chamberlain Sr. geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Dezember 1669 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Turner è nata il circa 1626 nel Essex, England come figlia di Edmund Turner. Lei sposato Edmund Chamberlain Sr. il 4 gennaio 1647, nel Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 6 dicembre 1669, nel Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolta a Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Turnerは約1626年にイギリスエセックスでEdmund Turnerの娘として生まれた。1647年1月4日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクロクスブリーでEdmund Chamberlain Sr.と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1669年12月6日にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスチェルムスフォードで44歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクロクスブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay, Br: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 헬스퍼드
ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Turner(은)는 대략 1626년 영국 에세스에서 Edmund Turner의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1647년 1월 4일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 록스버이에서 Edmund Chamberlain Sr.(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1669년 12월 6일 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 헬스퍼드에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 록스버이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mary Turner nasceu aproximadamente 1626, em Essex, Inglaterra filha de Edmund Turner. Ela casou-se com Edmund Chamberlain Sr. em 4 de janeiro de 1647, em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de dezembro de 1669, em Chelmsford, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, com 44 anos, e foi sepultada em Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Turner родилась около 1626 г. в местности эссекс, Англия. Её отца звали Edmund Turner. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Chamberlain Sr. 4 января 1647 г. в местности роксбури, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 6 декабря 1669 г. в местности челмсфорд, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности роксбури, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Turner nació aproximadamente 1626, en Essex, Inglaterra como hija de Edmund Turner. Se casó con Edmund Chamberlain Sr. el 4 de enero de 1647, en Roxbury, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 6 de diciembre de 1669, en Chelmsford, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en Roxbury, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
